backstory.original: Stami Gackle was a fun-loving and reckless youth, but she fled her home when this carefree nature invited tragic loss into her life. She found shelter in Waterdeep with the monks of the Order of the Even-Handed, who gave her a new name and trained her in their ways. Now a capable adventurer, Stoki approaches problems with intense focus and careful consideration, having earned a reputation for being uncommonly stoic. However, Stoki's patient demeanor belies a warrior's ferocity, as she unleashes a rapid flurry of masterful blows to any foe who refuses to back down.
backstory.display: 丝塔米·贾克尔是一个爱玩且鲁莽的年轻人，但在她这无牵无挂的个性给她的生活带来了悲剧性的损失之后，她逃离了她的家乡。她在深水城得到了公平者教会武僧的庇护，他们给她取了新的名字，并以他们的方式训练她。现在，斯托吉已经成为了一名能干的冒险者，她在处理问题时总是高度专注且深思熟虑，她也因其非同寻常的坚忍而声名远扬。然而，斯托吉坚忍的外表下隐藏着战士的凶猛，对于任何不肯退却的敌人，她会发动一连串迅猛的打击。

description.original: Stoki leaps out and attacks random enemies with her fists.
description.display: 斯托吉跳起并用拳头攻击随机敌人。

description.original: Stoki leaps around the screen attacking random enemies and causing damage over time.
description.display: 斯托吉在屏幕中跳来跳去，攻击随机敌人并造成持续伤害。

longDescription.original: Stoki leaps out and attacks five random enemies with extremely powerful palm thrusts. Over the next 10 seconds, all affected enemies take massive damage over time.
longDescription.display: 斯托吉跳来跳去并用极强力的掌击攻击 5 名随机敌人。在接下来的 10 秒内，所有受影响的敌人将受到高额持续伤害。

description.desc: When Stoki attacks she gains a Focus Point for each enemy she hits. She increases the damage of all Champions with a base attack cooldown of 4.0s or faster by $amount% for each Focus Point she has, stacking multiplicatively. Focus Points cap at $(amount___3) and are reduced by 50% (rounded down) when changing areas.
当斯托吉攻击时，她每击中一名敌人，就会获得 1 点专注点数。她每拥有 1 点专注点数，就会使所有基本攻击冷却时间为 4.0 秒或更短的勇士的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。专注点数的上限为 $(amount___3) 点，并且在改变区域时会减少 50%（向下取整）。

tipText.original: Stoki gains Focus Points when she attacks and works best with Champions that attack quickly.
tipText.display: 斯托吉在攻击时会获得专注点数，并且她与攻速快的勇士配合得最好。

description.desc: Enemies that have been attacked by Stoki at any point in the current area drop 100% more gold when killed for each Focus Point she has, stacking additively.
斯托吉每拥有 1 点专注点数，她任何时候在当前区域攻击过的敌人在被击杀时就会多掉落 100% 的金币，以加算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Enemies that Stoki attacks drop additional gold when they are killed, based on Stoki's Focus Points.
tipText.display: 根据斯托吉的专注点数，被她攻击过的敌人在被击杀时会掉落额外的金币。

description.desc: Stoki keeps track of the total Focus Points she has gained in the current adventure. If Stoki's Focus Points are capped for a given area, she still counts new ones towards this ability. Upon reaching certain milestones, the following effects activate:^^- 100 Focus Points: Encouragement - Champions adjacent to Stoki have their base attack cooldowns lowered by $(amount___2)s.^- 1000 Focus Points: Flurry of Blows - For every 1000 levels Stoki has, she attacks an additional target with each attack. She prefers to attack different targets, but will attack the same target multiple times if she has already attacked everyone.^- 5000 Focus Points: Leadership - Champions adjacent to Stoki have a 0.45% chance to reset their base attack cooldown after attacking for each Focus Point she currently has. Caps at 90%.^- 12500 Focus Points: Overflow - When Stoki attacks an enemy that she already attacked, there is a $amount___5% chance the enemy will be stunned for $stun_duration___5 seconds.^- 25000 Focus Points: Explosion - If Stoki hits the same enemy two or more times with the same base attack, power radiates from the enemy, dealing $seconds_of_bud___6 seconds worth of BUD damage to itself and all other nearby enemies. Triggers with each extra hit.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Encouragement - Champions adjacent to Stoki have their base attack cooldowns lowered by $(amount)s.

Flurry of Blows - For every 1000 levels Stoki has, she attacks an additional target with each attack. She prefers to attack different targets, but will attack the same target multiple times if she has already attacked everyone.^Bonus Attack Targets: $amount
Leadership - Champions adjacent to Stoki have a $amount% chance to reset their base attack cooldown after attacking. Caps at 90%.
Overflow - When Stoki attacks an enemy that she already attacked, there is a $amount% chance the enemy will be stunned for $stun_duration seconds.

Explosion - If Stoki hits the same enemy two or more times with the same base attack, power radiates from the enemy, dealing $seconds_of_bud seconds worth of BUD damage to itself and all other nearby enemies. Triggers with each extra hit.

description.desc: 斯托吉会记录她在当前冒险中获得的专注点数总数。如果斯托吉在某一特定区域的专注点数达到了上限，她仍会将新的点数计入这项技能。在达到一定的里程碑时，会激活以下效果：^^- 100 点专注点数：鼓舞——斯托吉相邻的勇士基本攻击冷却时间减少 $(amount___2) 秒。^- 1000 点专注点数：疾风连击——斯托吉每升 1000 级，她的每次攻击会额外攻击一个目标。她偏向攻击不同的目标，但如果所有敌人她都攻击过了，她会多次攻击同一个目标。^- 5000 点专注点数：领导力——斯托吉当前每拥有 1 点专注点数，她相邻的勇士就有 0.45% 的几率在攻击后重置他们的基本攻击冷却时间。上限为 90%。^- 12500 点专注点数：泛滥——当斯托吉攻击一个她已经攻击过的敌人时，有 $amount___5% 的几率使该敌人眩晕 $stun_duration___5 秒。^- 25000 点专注点数：爆炸——如果斯托吉用相同的基本攻击击中同一个敌人两次或两次以上，能量会从该敌人身上放射出去，对其自身和所有其他附近的敌人造成相当于 $seconds_of_bud___6 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。每次额外击中都会触发。

effect_keys.stack_title: 此次冒险中获得的专注点数

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 鼓舞——斯托吉相邻的勇士基本攻击冷却时间减少 $(amount) 秒。
疾风连击——斯托吉每升 1000 级，她的每次攻击会额外攻击一个目标。她偏向攻击不同的目标，但如果所有敌人她都攻击过了，她会多次攻击同一个目标。^额外攻击目标：$amount
领导力——斯托吉相邻的勇士有 $amount% 的几率在攻击后重置他们的基本攻击冷却时间。上限为 90%。
泛滥——当斯托吉攻击一个她已经攻击过的敌人时，有 $amount% 的几率使该敌人眩晕 $stun_duration 秒。
爆炸——如果斯托吉用相同的基本攻击击中同一个敌人两次或两次以上，能量会从该敌人身上放射出去，对其自身和所有其他附近的敌人造成相当于 $seconds_of_bud 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。每次额外击中都会触发。

description.desc: Stoki additively increases the Focus Points cap of Focused Strike by 10 for each Champion in the formation whose base attack cooldown is 4.0s or lower.
阵型中每有一位勇士的基本攻击冷却时间为 4.0 秒或更短，斯托吉会使“专注打击”的专注点数上限增加 10 点，以加算方式堆叠。
Stoki tracks the number of attacks her allies have performed in the past 10 seconds and increases the effect of Focused Strike by 15% for each one, stacking multiplicatively.
斯托吉会记录她的盟友在过去的 10 秒内攻击的次数，盟友们每攻击一次，她会使“专注打击”的效果增加 15%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Stoki counts on her fast attacking allies to get the job done quickly.
specializationDescription.display: 斯托吉依靠她快速攻击的盟友迅速完成任务。

description.desc: Stoki counts the number of Champions in the formation with a DEX score of 16 or higher. For each such Champion, her base attack cooldown is decreased by 0.1 seconds, stacking additively, and the effect of Focused Strike is increased by 100%, stacking multiplicatively.
斯托吉会统计阵型中敏捷大于等于 16 的勇士的数量。每有一名这样的勇士，她的基本攻击冷却时间就减少 0.1 秒，以加算方式堆叠，并且“专注打击”的效果增加 100%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Stoki is a star player when her nimble teammates set the pace.
specializationDescription.display: 当斯托吉敏捷的队友掌握进攻节奏时，她是一名明星选手。

description.desc: Stoki reduces the base attack cooldown of all Champions with a default base attack cooldown of 6.0 seconds or higher to 4.0 seconds so that they qualify for Frenzied Friends. Their damage is increased by 100% for each 0.1 seconds their base attack cooldown is reduced by this ability, stacking multiplicatively.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Reduces the cooldown of $target's Base Attack by $amount seconds.

description.desc: 斯托吉会使所有基本攻击冷却时间为 6.0 秒或更久的勇士的基本攻击冷却时间缩短为 4.0 秒，以便他们符合“狂热好友”的条件。他们的基本攻击冷却时间每被此技能缩短 0.1 秒，他们的伤害就提高 100%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 使$target的基本攻击冷却时间缩短 $amount 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Stoki sharpens the slowest to strike with speed, switching sluggish swings into swift sweeps.
specializationDescription.display: 斯托吉会提高攻击最慢的人的攻击速度，使缓慢的挥击变成迅猛的扫击。

description.original: I'll never be selfish again.
description.display: 我再也不会自私了。

description.original: I will train you to sharpen your focus.
description.display: 我会训练你，让你的注意力更集中。

description.original: Any money I earn goes to the monastery.
description.display: 我赚的所有钱都给了修道院。

description.original: Life brings us all a little luck.
description.display: 生活能给我们所有人带来一点运气。

description.original: I've never been more sure of what's right in my life.
description.display: 我从未如此确定，我生命里什么是对的。

description.original: My training began with one hundred strikes each dawn.
description.display: 我的训练从每天黎明一百次击打开始。

description.original: Channel their ferocity. Offer no hesitation.
description.display: 释放它们的凶猛，不要有丝毫犹豫。

description.original: Don't lose sight of what lies ahead.
description.display: 眼睛要始终盯着前方。

effects.description: Stoki's Focus Points are only reduced by 33% when changing areas.

description.original: We can't afford to waste time on distractions.
description.display: 我们可不能把时间浪费在让人分心的事情上。

effects.description: Stoki's Focus Points are only reduced by 20% when changing areas.

description.original: The monastery could do with some improvements.
description.display: 修道院需要修缮一下。

description.original: Even monks deserve a little luxury sometimes.
description.display: 即使是武僧，有时也该小小奢侈一把。

description.original: Again! Faster!
description.display: 再来！再快一点！

effects.description: Increases the attack cooldown reduction of Stoki's Building Focus - Encouragement ability to 1 second.

description.original: A precise blow to the right area can paralyze a foe.
description.display: 对准正确区域来一记精准打击可以麻痹敌人。

effects.description: Increases the stun chance of Stoki's Building Focus - Overflow ability by $amount%.

description.original: Twist the wrist just so to prolong the numbing effect.
description.display: 扭动手腕以延长麻木的效果。

effects.description: Increases the stun duration of Stoki's Building Focus - Overflow ability by 1 second.

description.original: Release the energy when the moment is right. Patience...
description.display: 在合适的时机释放能量。要有耐心……

effects.description: Increases the BUD damage of Stoki's Building Focus - Explosion ability by 80%.

description.original: There is so much more to learn. I must continue my training.
description.display: 要学的东西还有很多，我必须继续我的训练。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Stoki's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: The monk's path is one of absolute dedication without end.
description.display: 武僧之路是一条没有尽头的绝对奉献之路。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Stoki's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: A monk's training demands graceful movement. I will demonstrate.
description.display: 武僧的训练必须动作优雅。我来示范一下。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Stami Gackle was a fun-loving and reckless youth, but she fled her home when this carefree nature invited tragic loss into her life. She found shelter in Waterdeep with the monks of the Order of the Even-Handed, who gave her a new name and trained her in their ways. Now a capable adventurer, Stoki approaches problems with intense focus and careful consideration, having earned a reputation for being uncommonly stoic. However, Stoki's patient demeanor belies a warrior's ferocity, as she unleashes a rapid flurry of masterful blows to any foe who refuses to back down.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Stoki is a support and gold find Champion who works best when she can build up her Focus with Champions who attack quickly.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 丝塔米·贾克尔是一个爱玩且鲁莽的年轻人，但在她这无牵无挂的个性给她的生活带来了悲剧性的损失之后，她逃离了她的家乡。她在深水城得到了公平者教会武僧的庇护，他们给她取了新的名字，并以他们的方式训练她。现在，斯托吉已经成为了一名能干的冒险者，她在处理问题时总是高度专注且深思熟虑，她也因其非同寻常的坚忍而声名远扬。然而，斯托吉坚忍的外表下隐藏着战士的凶猛，对于任何不肯退却的敌人，她会发动一连串迅猛的打击。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 斯托吉是一名支援和金币寻获型勇士，她与攻击速度较快的勇士搭配能增强她的专注力，从而有最好的表现。
